parents.subject: LU-6826 lod: validate stripe_count and offset

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: reproducer
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: reproducer

trying to reproduce LU-6895

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 \
mdsdistro=el7 mdtcount=1 \
testlist=sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck

Change-Id: Iffc8a79a4a6226af3596403f8f58ea9c8f21b286
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
